## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Enhancement to existing feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Quality checklist

- [ ] I have tested this change locally
- [ ] New/changed features have unit or integration tests
- [ ] TypeScript types are correct — no `any` unless justified
- [ ] Error handling is appropriate (no swallowed errors)
- [ ] No security issues introduced (SQL injection, XSS, secrets in code, etc.)
- [ ] Database migrations are safe and reversible
- [ ] PR description clearly explains the **what** and **why**
- [ ] No `console.log` or debug code left in
